assertions.description: indexedDB is exposed on the window object (baseline).
Round-trips a 64-bit integer payload exercising the SQLite INTEGER column path.
Round-trips an ArrayBuffer — exercises the SQLite BLOB storage path.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const n='__sqlb_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);return await new Promise(r=>{const q=indexedDB.open(n,1);q.onupgradeneeded=()=>q.result.createObjectStore('s');q.onsuccess=()=>{const d=q.result;const tx=d.transaction('s','readwrite');const buf=new Uint8Array([1,2,3,4,255]).buffer;tx.objectStore('s').put(buf,'k');tx.oncomplete=()=>{const r2=d.transaction('s','readonly').objectStore('s').get('k');r2.onsuccess=()=>{const v=new Uint8Array(r2.result);const ok=v[0]===1 && v[4]===255 && v.length===5;d.close();indexedDB.deleteDatabase(n);r(ok);};};};});})()

assertions.description: openCursor on an index iterates in correct order — exercises SQL ordering vs LevelDB ordering.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const n='__sqlc_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);return await new Promise(r=>{const q=indexedDB.open(n,1);q.onupgradeneeded=()=>{const s=q.result.createObjectStore('s',{keyPath:'id'});s.createIndex('byName','name');};q.onsuccess=()=>{const d=q.result;const tx=d.transaction('s','readwrite');const st=tx.objectStore('s');[{id:1,name:'c'},{id:2,name:'a'},{id:3,name:'b'}].forEach(o=>st.put(o));tx.oncomplete=()=>{const tx2=d.transaction('s','readonly');const cur=tx2.objectStore('s').index('byName').openCursor();const out=[];cur.onsuccess=e=>{const c=e.target.result;if(c){out.push(c.value.name);c.continue();}else{const ok=JSON.stringify(out)===JSON.stringify(['a','b','c']);d.close();indexedDB.deleteDatabase(n);r(ok);}};};};});})()

assertions.description: deleteDatabase removes a created database — exercises SQLite file cleanup.
